title: Protocol G: Preparation of reporter DNA
steps: • Qiagen Spin Miniprep Kit Cat No. 27104 • I usually do two minipreps for one nucleofection

• Use a standard ethanol precipitation with sodium acetate or speed-vac to conentrate DNA • Be careful not to overdry DNA or else it will be come insoluble. DNA from ethanol preciptation pellets tends to be more soluble.
• Quantify the DNA by UV-Vis spectrophotometry using the approximation of 1 OD at 260 nm = 50 ng/µl of DNA
creator: David Booth
